use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF ADMINISTERING AN OPIOID MAINTENANCE TREATMENT COMPRISING BUPRENORPHINE
A METHOD OF ADMINISTERING AN OPIOID MAINTENANCE TREATMENT COMPRISING BUPRENORPHINE. A METHOD OF TREATING OPIOID WITHDRAWAL USING AN OPIOID MAINTENANCE TREATMENT COMPRISING BUPRENORPHINE

A METHOD OF DELIVERY OF A BIOACTIVE AGENT BY SUBCUTANEOUS INJECTION. A METHOD OF TREATMENT OF A HUMAN FOR ADDICTION
